title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on urban mobility and transport policy.

questions.question: To what extent do you think individuals should change their transport habits to reduce carbon emissions, and what role should governments play?
How do you think the development of electric and autonomous vehicles will change urban transport over the next twenty years?

script.text: To what extent do you think individuals should change their transport habits to reduce carbon emissions, and what role should governments play?
How do you think the development of electric and autonomous vehicles will change urban transport over the next twenty years?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
